title: ギャップイヤー①（利点）
prompt: In some countries, young people are encouraged to work or travel for a year between finishing high school and starting university. Discuss the advantages and disadvantages.
prompt_jp: 高校卒業後、大学入学までの1年間、働いたり旅行したりすることが勧められる国がある。利点と欠点を論じよ。
outline_jp: 欠点: お金の問題（貯蓄と予算）
利点: 進路を明確にできる
例: 専攻を焦って決めると合わないことも
利点: 多様な仕事を試せる
model_answer: In some countries, young people take a gap year to work, travel or volunteer before university.
The clearest drawback is money: you need to put money aside and stick to your budget.
On the other hand, the most significant advantage is that a gap year helps people clarify their best course of action.
For example, those who rush into choosing a major may find that it does not suit them.
A gap year also gives a chance to try a range of jobs and see if they would suit working abroad.

items.collocation: put money aside for a trip

drills.jp: 最も明白な欠点はお金で、貯蓄し予算を守る必要がある。
drills.model_en: The clearest drawback is money: you need to put money aside and stick to your budget.

drills.jp: 他方で、最大の利点は進路を明確にできることだ。
drills.model_en: On the other hand, the biggest advantage is that it helps you clarify your best course of action.

drills.jp: 例えば、専攻を焦って決める人は、それが自分に合わないと気づくことがある。
drills.model_en: For example, those who rush into choosing a major may find it does not suit them.
